en.value: (1) Input by JICA(a)Dispatch of Mission-rehabilitation/recovery plan-Disaster resilient plan under BBB concept-Structural engineering-Risk/ vulnerability assessment of building and infrastructure-Land use plan-Urban deveopment management institutions-Disaster evalution and management-Infrastructure plans and engineering designs-Tourism and cultural heritage recovery-Environment and social consideration-GIS and digital mapping-Community disaster management-Livelihood recovery and enhancement-Housing subsidy and dissemination mechanism-capacity development(b) Training(2) Input by GoN(a) Assign counterpart personnel and administrative personnel as well as mobilize relevant organizations to cooperate with and implement the project in an effective manner.(b) Arrange suitable office space with necessary equipment.(c) Supply or replacement of machinery, equipment, instruments, vehicles,tools,spareparts and other materials necessary for the implementation of the project other than the equipment provided by JICA.(d) Information as well as support in obtaining medical services.(e) Credentials or identification cards(f) Available data and information related to the project.(g) Running expenses necessary for the implementation of the project.

executing_agency: Ministry of Water Supply, Ministry of Physical Infrastructure and Transport, Ministry of Health and Population
implementing_agency: Ministry of Water Supply, Ministry of Physical Infrastructure and Transport, Ministry of Health and Population

en.full: The Project on Rehabilitation and Recovery from Nepal Earthquake (Infrastructures Grant)

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
